# orcasecurity_rbac_roles (Data Source)

Lists all RBAC roles from GET /api/rbac/role. Pick a role id with a for expression or one([for r in ... : r.id if r.name == "Viewer"]).



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Read-Only

- `roles` (Attributes List) Each object is one role from the API. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--roles))

<a id="nestedatt--roles"></a>
### Nested Schema for `roles`

Read-Only:

- `id` (String) Role id (use with orcasecurity_group_access.role_id).
- `name` (String) Display name of the role.
